song.title: Lord Jesus, You’re Lovely
song.author: Debbie Bradshaw
song.lyrics:
[V1] .C G Lord Jesus, You’re lovely. . F C You’re more to be desired, . Am C Than any earthly pleasure. . F G You’re fine, beyond compare. . C G Lord Jesus, Your beauty . F C Does far exceed all others. . Am C You’re comely and You’re tender. . F G C You’re radiant and You’re fair.
[V2] When I behold You Jesus, You draw my heart completely. I cannot turn away Lord, I rest in Your embrace; And time if gone there’s only Your holy, matchless presence Abiding in You, gazing Upon Your glorious face -
[V3] I give my life to You Lord, For You alone are worthy. There’s nothing and there’s no One That I desire but You. May all my days be Yours, Lord, My heart be given to Lord You, To treasure and to serve You By Your sufficient grace.
